title: openssl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.2.2-16.0.1.4]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]
- Update FIPS provider name [Orabug: 35824276]

[1:3.2.2-16.4]
- openssl 3.2.2 has 3_4_0 version in the symbol table (JIRA:RHEL-105518)
full_text:
[3.2.2-16.0.1.4]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]
- Update FIPS provider name [Orabug: 35824276]

[1:3.2.2-16.4]
- openssl 3.2.2 has 3_4_0 version in the symbol table (JIRA:RHEL-105518)
